method: opus subagent, cognitive isolation, PubMed + WebSearch verified

trials.trialName: Coronary Revascularisation in TAVI Patients — IPD Meta-analysis of 4 RCTs
trials.question: In TAVI candidates with concomitant CAD, does PCI improve outcomes? Which patients benefit? What is the optimal strategy?
trials.clinicalImpact: Highest-level evidence for managing CAD in TAVI candidates. Will shift practice from routine PCI toward selective physiology-guided approach. Will inform ESC/EAPCI guideline updates.
trials.whyAttend: 四大隨機試驗（ACTIVATION/NOTION-3/FAITAVI/PRO-TAVI）共1476位患者的IPD統合分析——首度以統一框架回答TAVI合併冠心病的核心問題：哪些患者需要PCI？何時做？FFR導引還是血管攝影導引？這是TAVI冠脈處理策略的最高級別證據，直接影響每日臨床決策。
componentTrials: ACTIVATION (n=235, JACC CI 2021): PCI vs no-PCI before TAVI — non-inferiority NOT met, essentially neutral
NOTION-3 (n=455, NEJM 2024): FFR-guided PCI vs conservative — PCI SUPERIOR (26% vs 36%, HR 0.71, p=0.04)
FAITAVI (n=320, EHJ 2025): FFR-guided vs angio-guided PCI — FFR SUPERIOR (8.5% vs 16%, HR 0.52, p=0.047)
PRO-TAVI (n=466, Lancet 2026): Deferral vs upfront PCI — Deferral NON-INFERIOR (24% vs 26%), less bleeding (6% vs 15%)
trials.expectedResult: Modest overall PCI benefit (driven by MI/urgent revasc reduction), no mortality benefit, significant bleeding trade-off, critical subgroup heterogeneity favoring PCI in severe CAD (high SYNTAX, FFR-positive) while supporting conservative management in milder disease

trials.trialName: Long-term Mortality PCI DES vs CABG for Left Main — Updated IPD of 4 RCTs
trials.question: Does PCI with DES remain competitive vs CABG for left main disease beyond 5-10 years?
trials.priorResult: 5yr IPD (Lancet 2021): all-cause death 11.2% PCI vs 10.2% CABG (HR 1.10, p=0.33). Bayesian: 85.7% probability CABG superior but <0.2%/yr difference.
trials.emergingEvidence: NOBLE 10yr (Lancet Apr 2026): NO mortality difference (23% vs 25%, HR 0.93, p=0.56). PRECOMBAT 10yr: no difference (14.5% vs 13.8%). SYNTAX 10yr: no difference in LM (24.2% vs 21.4%).
trials.expectedResult: 10yr pooled IPD will likely show NO significant mortality difference, strengthening case for PCI in low-intermediate SYNTAX Score patients
trials.clinicalImpact: Directly affects Heart Team decision-making for left main disease. May shift guidelines toward equipoise for SYNTAX ≤32.
trials.whyAttend: 三大RCT的10年數據已陸續發表——均顯示左主幹PCI vs CABG無顯著死亡率差異。Bergmark的更新版IPD統合分析將整合所有最長隨訪數據，可能是改變Heart Team決策和指南推薦的決定性證據。TIMI Study Group的嚴謹學術品質保證。

trials.trialName: CHAMPION-AF Age Subgroup Analysis — LAA Closure vs NOAC by Age
trials.type: Pre-specified subgroup analysis of landmark RCT
trials.question: Does the benefit of LAA closure vs NOAC differ by patient age?
trials.parentTrial: CHAMPION-AF (NEJM Mar 2026, n=3000): LAAC noninferior for efficacy (5.7% vs 4.8%), SUPERIOR for bleeding (10.9% vs 19.0%, HR 0.55)
trials.criticalContext: CLOSURE-AF (NEJM Mar 2026, n=912, mean age 78, CHA2DS2-VASc 5.2) FAILED noninferiority → age is the key modifier
trials.expectedResult: Bleeding benefit amplified in elderly; efficacy noninferiority may be attenuated in very elderly (≥75) consistent with CLOSURE-AF signal
trials.clinicalImpact: Will define age thresholds for LAAC patient selection — critical for guidelines and Heart Team discussions
trials.whyAttend: CHAMPION-AF是首個以NOAC為對照的大型LAAC RCT，年齡分層分析回答最關鍵的臨床問題：哪些年齡層的病人可將LAAC視為第一線選擇？同月發表的CLOSURE-AF在高齡族群失敗，使此分析成為LAAC適應症的分水嶺。

trials.trialName: HI-PEITHO — Catheter-Directed Therapy for Intermediate-High Risk PE
trials.question: Does USAT (EKOS) + anticoagulation reduce PE-related death/decompensation vs anticoagulation alone in intermediate-high risk PE?
trials.design: n=544, 59 sites, USA+Europe, USAT vs anticoagulation alone
trials.mainResult: PUBLISHED NEJM Mar 2026: primary endpoint 4.0% vs 10.3% (RR 0.39, P=0.005). 61% relative risk reduction. ZERO intracranial hemorrhage. NNT ~16.
trials.clinicalImpact: First positive hard-outcome RCT for catheter-based PE intervention. Opens PE as a new procedural domain for interventional cardiologists with Level 1 evidence.
trials.whyAttend: HI-PEITHO是第一個以硬終點證實導管導向治療優於單純抗凝的大型PE RCT——主要終點事件減少61%且零顆內出血。由PE管理世界權威Konstantinides（PEITHO PI + ESC指南主筆）親自報告。對介入心臟科開啟全新的PE介入領域。

trials.trialName: SELUTION DeNovo — Sirolimus DCB for De Novo Coronary Lesions
trials.question: Is sirolimus-eluting balloon (SELUTION SLR) with provisional stenting noninferior to DES for all-comer de novo coronary lesions?
trials.design: n=3323, 62 sites, 12 countries, SEB vs DES, 5yr follow-up
trials.device: SELUTION SLR: PLGA microspheres + sirolimus 1 µg/mm², sustained 90-day release mimicking DES pharmacokinetics
trials.result12mo: TCT 2025: TVF 5.3% vs 4.4% — noninferiority MET. 80% of DCB patients avoided stent.
trials.euroPCR2026: Expected: new subset analyses (complexity subgroups, small vessels, ACS, angiographic/OCT substudy)
trials.clinicalImpact: Paradigm shift: if confirmed at 5yr, sirolimus-DCB could replace DES as default PCI strategy — 'leave nothing behind'
trials.whyAttend: 全球最大DCB RCT（3323例）首次在all-comers de novo病變驗證sirolimus DCB不劣於DES。12月TVF 5.3% vs 4.4%達到非劣性，80%球囊組免植支架。本次發表新亞組分析。對DCB取代DES的趨勢有決定性影響。

trials.trialName: OPTIMAL — DCB Trial for De Novo Coronary Lesions
trials.question: Likely: DCB vs DES for de novo coronary lesions, or sirolimus vs paclitaxel DCB comparison
trials.note: No prior publications found — likely first presentation of novel European RCT data
trials.presenterContext: Belgrade, European Bifurcation Club leader, coronary physiology + imaging expert
trials.clinicalImpact: Complementary to SELUTION DeNovo — may provide European-origin DCB data for de novo lesions
trials.whyAttend: OPTIMAL是DCB-for-de-novo這一熱門領域的最新試驗更新，與SELUTION DeNovo同場發表。Milasinovic是歐洲年輕介入領袖，很可能是全新歐洲RCT數據的首次公開報告。

trials.trialName: OPTION — LAA Closure vs OAC After AF Ablation
trials.question: Is LAAC with Watchman FLX noninferior to OAC for stroke prevention in AF patients undergoing catheter ablation?
trials.design: n=1600, AF ablation patients, Watchman FLX vs continued OAC
trials.mainResult: NEJM 2024: Noninferior for thromboembolic events (5.3% vs 5.8%). SUPERIOR for bleeding (8.5% vs 18.1%, ~56% reduction). 40.8% had concomitant ablation+LAAC.
trials.subAnalyses: Concomitant vs sequential LAAC equally safe/effective (Heart Rhythm 2025). AF recurrence does not affect LAAC stroke prevention benefit.
trials.combinedLandscape: OPTION + CHAMPION-AF + CLOSURE-AF together reshape LAA closure: Level 1 evidence supports LAAC with ~50% bleeding reduction, BUT very elderly/high-risk (CLOSURE-AF) may not benefit → patient selection is key.
trials.whyKnowThis: OPTION+CHAMPION-AF共同確立LAAC為NOAC的可行替代方案，但CLOSURE-AF的警示表明高齡高風險患者可能不適合。三項試驗交叉理解才能掌握LAAC的完整全景——這對參加EuroPCR多場LAA相關session至關重要。

trials.trialName: SORT OUT XII — Ultra-thin Strut DES (Evermine50) + DAPT Duration in ACS
trials.question: TWO co-registered trials: (1) STENT: Evermine50 (50µm, world's thinnest) vs Xience/Promus EES; (2) DAPT: abbreviated vs guideline DAPT in ACS
trials.design: Each arm n=3150, Danish 3-centre registry-based RCT
trials.device: Evermine50: 50µm CoCr strut, biodegradable PLLA+PLGA polymer, everolimus 1.25µg/mm² (Meril Life Sciences)
trials.expectedAtEuroPCR: Recruitment update + Evermine50 bench/registry data. Primary results not yet available.
trials.seriesContext: SORT OUT series: 2 of last 3 experimental stents FAILED (IX: BioFreedom, X: Combo) — this consortium is famously rigorous
trials.clinicalImpact: If Evermine50 passes SORT OUT's strict test, validates 4th-gen ultra-thin DES from Asia in Europe's most rigorous pragmatic RCT
trials.whyAttend: 丹麥SORT OUT系列以嚴格著稱——近三次試驗中兩次實驗組失敗。SORT OUT XII首次以全球最薄支架柱（50µm）Evermine50在all-comers RCT中挑戰Xience/Promus。同時進行的DAPT試驗探索ACS患者縮短抗血小板治療。雖然目前仍在收案，但此Meril衛星會可了解最新進展。
